bullets: Architected and built the organization's first real-time LLM and embedding-model serving platform, enabling flagship product initiatives and revenue growth.
Defined and architected a unified ML development platform—from classic deep models to 100B+ LLMs—accelerating the organization's time-to-impact.
Drove advertiser-facing ML products (retrieval, ranking, and recommendations) to unlock significant nine-figure annual revenue growth.
Architected a 0-to-1 deep-learning platform enabling code-free training through serving at scale, adopted across teams.
Led the language-model inference engine under strict latency and reliability bars, significantly improving user experience.
Re-architected cross-team feature-release pipelines and optimized model building, driving substantial annual cost savings and efficiency gains.
Built and deployed an AI-assisted surgical-monitoring system, successfully deployed to partnered medical centers.
